name: @loradb/lora-node
description: Node.js / TypeScript bindings for the Lora in-memory graph database
author: LoraDB, Inc.

scripts.sync:types: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const f of ['types.ts','decode.ts']) fs.copyFileSync('../shared-ts/' + f, 'ts/' + f);"
scripts.verify:types: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const f of ['types.ts','decode.ts']) { const a=fs.readFileSync('../shared-ts/' + f,'utf8'); const b=fs.readFileSync('ts/' + f,'utf8'); if (a!==b) { console.error('ts/' + f + ' is out of sync with shared-ts/' + f + ' — run npm run sync:types'); process.exit(1);} } "
scripts.build: npm run build:native && npm run build:ts
scripts.copy-license: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); try { fs.copyFileSync('../../../LICENSE','LICENSE'); } catch (e) { if (e.code !== 'ENOENT') throw e; }"
scripts.prepack: npm run sync:types && npm run copy-license && npm run build
